CaseStudies.metaTitle: Case studies — Inna Boiko | React & Next.js SaaS in production
CaseStudies.metaDescription: Real React and Next.js development case studies: architecture, security and SaaS modules in production. ZeusDental, a multi-tenant platform for dental clinics.
CaseStudies.indexIntro: Not just what I built, but how and why. Context, technical challenges and results of real products in production.
CaseStudies.ctaText: I can build clean, secure, production-ready architectures for you. Let's talk.

zeusdental.title: ZeusDental
zeusdental.subtitle: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for dental clinics
zeusdental.summary: Frontend developer of a healthcare platform in production: feature-slice SPA architecture, security-by-design on the frontend and real SaaS modules (appointments, quotes, invoicing).
zeusdental.context: ZeusDental is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for managing dental clinics: appointments, clinical data, quotes and invoicing, with multiple clinics served by the same application. I own the product's entire frontend, from SPA architecture to production releases.
zeusdental.challenge: Handling sensitive medical data demands non-negotiable security and reliability. The challenge: build a scalable, multi-tenant SPA with data isolation between clinics, robust frontend security and complex modules (calendar, invoicing) while keeping the code testable and maintainable by a single person.
zeusdental.solutionIntro: I structured the work around three pillars: architecture, security and real production modules.
zeusdental.solArchDesc: React SPA organized into 13 feature slices, Redux Toolkit + redux-persist for state, React Router 7 and a clinic-context to isolate each tenant's data.
zeusdental.solSecDesc: Encrypted JWT (AES-GCM 256-bit, Web Crypto API), Content Security Policy, inactivity timer, cross-tab logout via BroadcastChannel and applied STRIDE threat modeling.
zeusdental.solModDesc: Day/Week/Month/Year appointment calendar, quotes, invoicing and clinical data: real modules, in production, on a multi-tenant architecture.
zeusdental.result: The platform is in production and used daily by clinics. The codebase is covered by a reliable test suite that protects evolutions and releases.

FAQ.title: FAQ
FAQ.q1: How much does a website cost?
FAQ.a1: It depends on features and complexity. Projects start at €1,500, while a startup MVP ranges from €3,000 to €8,000. You'll find all tiers on the Services page, and I prepare a clear quote upfront, no surprises.
FAQ.q2: How long does it take to build?
FAQ.a2: A professional website usually takes 2-4 weeks; a complete MVP 3-5 weeks. We agree on exact timelines once we've defined the project scope together.
FAQ.q3: Do you work remotely? Can I be outside Bari?
FAQ.a3: Yes. I work remotely with clients across Italy and abroad. We meet over video calls and I keep you updated at every step of the project.
FAQ.q4: What's the difference between you and an agency?
FAQ.a4: You talk directly with the person building your product: no middlemen, faster decisions and more accessible costs. I bring real experience with production SaaS, security and performance.
FAQ.q5: Do you offer support after launch?
FAQ.a5: Yes. I offer maintenance packages (from €100/month) for updates, fixes and improvements, keeping your site fast and secure over time.

Philosophy.conventionalText: Too many projects chase aesthetics alone, neglecting <hl>architecture, tests and security</hl> — until they break in production.
Philosophy.manifestoText:
I start from clean architecture,

reliable tests and security

by design. AI to move

faster, not to skip steps.

Protocol.p1Desc: CRUD of companies and promotions on Next.js 16 + React 19. Parallel & Intercepting Routes, Server Components consuming typed Route Handlers, TanStack Query for server state.
Protocol.p2Desc: Server Components, Server Actions and Route Handlers. Auth.js v5 with edge middleware, Drizzle ORM on PGlite (in-browser Postgres WASM) and full SEO (Metadata API, JSON-LD, OG images).
Protocol.p3Desc: A booking platform in a single Next.js app: React UI, Route Handlers and Auth.js (persistent cookie session). Calendar with dynamic slots, favorites, IT/EN i18n and an admin moderation panel. Migrated from Strapi to Prisma + Neon: single deployment, €0 cost and no cold starts.
Protocol.s1Desc: Google Jobs API integration, an AI agent system (LangGraph) and task & note management.
Protocol.s2Desc: Threat modeling (STRIDE, DREAD), mapping to MITRE ATT&CK / NIST and definition of security requirements.
